name=rule_block_telnet action=block srchost=any srciface=any dsthost=any dstiface=any dstserv=telnet status=on rank=3 schedule=always inspection= log=log comment="Block all telnet"
name=rule_allow_dns action=pass srchost=Network_LAN srciface=eth0 dsthost=dns_servers dstiface=eth1 dstserv=dns_udp status=on rank=4 schedule=always inspection= log=minor comment="Allow DNS resolution"
name=rule_allow_smtp action=pass srchost=srv_mail srciface=eth1 dsthost=any dstiface=eth2 dstserv=smtp status=on rank=5 schedule=business_hours inspection=IPS_01 log=log comment="Mail server outbound SMTP"
name=rule_allow_vpn_users action=pass srchost=VPN_Pool srciface=tun0 dsthost=Network_Internal dstiface=eth0 dstserv=any status=on rank=6 schedule=always inspection=IPS_00 log=log comment="VPN users to internal"
name=rule_nat_masq action=pass srchost=Network_LAN srciface=eth0 dsthost=any dstiface=eth2 dstserv=any status=on rank=7 schedule=always inspection= nat=masquerade log=minor comment="Internet access with masquerade"
name=rule_allow_icmp action=pass srchost=any srciface=any dsthost=firewall_out dstiface=any dstserv=icmp status=on rank=8 schedule=always inspection= log=minor comment="Allow ICMP to firewall"
name=rule_block_p2p action=block srchost=Network_LAN srciface=eth0 dsthost=any dstiface=eth2 dstserv=any status=on rank=9 schedule=always inspection=IPS_00 log=log comment="Block P2P applications" srcuser=
name=rule_default_deny action=block srchost=any srciface=any dsthost=any dstiface=any dstserv=any status=on rank=10 schedule=always inspection= log=log comment="Default deny all"
100 code=00a00100 msg="Ok"
